title: Northern Journey Reactive Music Soundtrack
description: This resource pack for Reactive Music by CircuitLord adds music tracks from the game "Northern Journey" by Slid Studio.
body:
THIS WILL NOT WORK WITHOUT THE [REACTIVE MUSIC](https://modrinth.com/mod/reactive-music) MOD

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/YLV-gZ2PgNE" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

Overview/Instructions:
This is a Custom Songpack for the mod [Reactive Music](https://modrinth.com/mod/reactive-music) by CircuitLord. You install it like a regular resource pack, but instead of enabling it in the resource pack menu you need to open the config for Reactive Music and select the pack there.

Additionally, this pack has been tested and works on 1.21.1 Neoforge! Simply install Sinytra Connector, Install Reactive Music and run /reactivemusic in-game to select a songpack!

What this pack adds:
It adds songs from the game "Northern Journey" by Slid Studio, a Norwegian happysad adventure game. The songpack includes generic biome-specific triggers, boss triggers, triggers for when a player is fishing, dying, near home, underground and deep underground, As well as dimension-specific music including biome-specific music for the Nether.

Mod Compatability:
Since many of the triggers are relatively generic (e.g. Music that plays in any biome with "snowy" or "field" in the name, or biomes with tags). However, mods that add many biomes with highly specific names and no biome tags will not always play the more specific tracks and will default to the more generic day/night music.

As such I highly recommend playing with mods that mainly overhaul existing biomes such as [Ecospherical Expansion](https://modrinth.com/mod/ecospherical-expansion), [William Wyther's Overhauled Overworld](https://modrinth.com/mod/wwoo), [Blooming Biosphere](https://modrinth.com/datapack/blooming-biosphere), Or mods with lots of biome tags such as [Biomes O' Plenty](https://modrinth.com/mod/biomes-o-plenty/versions).

Permissions:
You are welcome to use this resource pack in modpacks, or to take it apart and use it as a template for your own songpacks!

Credits:
Slid Studio, for making the incredible game Northern Journey. Special thanks to CircuitLord for personally answering my questions about the songpack creation process.


If you would like to join the discord server dedicated to my projects, please message me on discord @gravitybreacher for an invite.
